pipeline_flow.title: Load raster image
pipeline_flow.implementation: preprocess.load_image_bgr, preprocess.load_pdf_page_as_bgr; pipeline.load_input_bgr / panel_dxf_pipeline._load_bgr

pipeline_flow.title: Convert to grayscale
pipeline_flow.implementation: preprocess.preprocess (cv2.cvtColor BGR→GRAY)

pipeline_flow.title: Apply adaptive thresholding
pipeline_flow.implementation: annotation_clean.inks_mask_from_gray (cv2.adaptiveThreshold ADAPTIVE_THRESH_GAUSSIAN_C, THRESH_BINARY_INV)

pipeline_flow.title: Perform deskewing/alignment
pipeline_flow.implementation: preprocess._deskew_gray (invoked from preprocess.preprocess when deskew=True)

pipeline_flow.title: Remove noise
pipeline_flow.implementation: preprocess.preprocess bilateral denoise; skeleton_vectorize.extract_vector_drawing remove_small_objects on foreground before skeletonize

pipeline_flow.title: Apply morphology closing to reconnect broken lines
pipeline_flow.implementation: annotation_clean.suppress_hatches_and_dimensions MORPH_CLOSE on binary ink (when suppress_ruling_lines=True); preprocess._deskew_gray uses a small close on Otsu mask

pipeline_flow.title: Separate OCR/text layer from geometry layer
pipeline_flow.implementation: ocr_extract.extract_text_boxes; optional ocr_llm_correct.correct_text_boxes_ollama / correct_text_boxes_gemini; optional semantic_segment.semantic_prepare_gray_for_vectorize (ONNX classes); annotation_clean.apply_text_masks / apply_text_masks_interior_only before inks_mask_from_gray

pipeline_flow.title: Detect line segments using LSD/Hough Transform
pipeline_flow.implementation: Primary path: skeleton_graph.trace_skeleton_polylines. Alternates: vectorize._legacy_hough_extract_segments (HoughLinesP). Optional supplement: geometry_intel.lsd_extract_segments (cv2.createLineSegmentDetector) via --vectorize-lsd-supplement in vectorize.extract_skeleton_vector_bundle.

pipeline_flow.title: Detect circles/arcs using HoughCircles
pipeline_flow.implementation: skeleton_vectorize.detect_circles (optional, off by default): tighter Hough params, rim + **hole-interior** validation on binary ink, hard cap on count. Enable with --skeleton-circles. vector_fit.apply_polyline_fittings for arc / loop-to-CIRCLE when arc fitting is on.

pipeline_flow.title: Detect rectangles and closed polylines
pipeline_flow.implementation: Closed loops: skeleton traces with closed=True → geometry_model.PolylineDef.closed. Orthogonal 4-gons tallied as rectangle_like_polylines (geometry_intel.count_corner_rectangles); no separate DXF RECTANGLE entity type.

pipeline_flow.title: Snap nearby endpoints together
pipeline_flow.implementation: vectorize.extract_skeleton_vector_bundle → _merge_close_endpoints on exploded segments

pipeline_flow.title: Merge collinear and overlapping lines
pipeline_flow.implementation: exploded segments: vectorize._merge_close_endpoints; optional topology_clean.refine_vector_drawing when --python-topology-clean; CAD join/overkill deferred to AutoCAD MCP by default.

pipeline_flow.title: Reconstruct topology graph/connectivity
pipeline_flow.implementation: skeleton_graph.skeleton_adjacency_graph + trace_skeleton_polylines; optional topology_repair.extend_free_endpoints_to_intersections (ray hits); cad_geometry_rebuild.vector_drawing_from_healed_segments aligns DXF with healed LINE graph

pipeline_flow.title: Detect dimensions, arrows, and extension lines
pipeline_flow.implementation: Partial: annotation_clean.suppress_hatches_and_dimensions removes long horizontal ruling motifs; no dedicated arrow/dimension classifier.

pipeline_flow.title: Group related entities into drawing parts/blocks
pipeline_flow.implementation: pipeline: link_geometry.link_vector_geometry_to_parts + link_parts.PartGroup; panels: panel_split.split_panels then per-crop export

pipeline_flow.title: Preserve original scaling and coordinates
pipeline_flow.implementation: PreprocessResult.original_shape, scale; RunConfig.mm_per_pixel; export_dxf.image_xy_to_dxf consistent Y-flip + scale in manifests

pipeline_flow.title: Convert primitives into CAD entities (LINE, ARC, CIRCLE, TEXT, etc.)
pipeline_flow.implementation: export_dxf._emit_vector_entities: LWPOLYLINE, ARC, CIRCLE, LINE residuals; TEXT via PartGroup label points on part layers

pipeline_flow.title: Generate structured DXF entities/layers
pipeline_flow.implementation: export_dxf.export_merged_dxf / export_part_dxf / export_segments_only (layer-per-part or GEOMETRY/LABEL conventions)

pipeline_flow.title: Export final DXF file
pipeline_flow.implementation: ezdxf writes in export_dxf; paths recorded in *_manifest.json

pipeline_flow.title: Run post-processing cleanup and validation
pipeline_flow.implementation: Default: export rough DXF + ``*_autocad_mcp_recipe.json`` for JOIN / OVERKILL / PEDIT / layers / dimensions in AutoCAD (MCP). Optional in-process: topology_clean, vector_fit, geometry_intel bridge/dedupe (--python-* flags); geometry_intel.geometry_quality_report + manifest warnings.

engineering_intelligence_layers.title: Semantic reasoning
engineering_intelligence_layers.implementation: engineering_intel_passes.semantic_reasoning_snapshot when --python-engineering-intel; link_geometry / OCR part association at export time always when OCR enabled.

engineering_intelligence_layers.title: Engineering constraints
engineering_intelligence_layers.implementation: constraint_heal (+ engineering_intel residual snaps) only with --python-constraint-heal and --python-engineering-intel; otherwise defer to AutoCAD constraints/MCP.

engineering_intelligence_layers.title: Topology intelligence
engineering_intelligence_layers.implementation: topology_repair on segments with --python-topology-segment-repair; topology_intel metrics with --python-engineering-intel; else MCP/CAD for graph cleanup.

engineering_intelligence_layers.title: CAD regularization
engineering_intelligence_layers.implementation: topology_clean / vectorize refinements when --python-*; primary regularization via AutoCAD MCP recipe.

engineering_intelligence_layers.title: Dimension understanding
engineering_intelligence_layers.implementation: annotations_export.dimension_association_bundle: axis hints + OCR↔stroke association records + perpendicular extension stubs on DIMENSION_HINT layer (when export enabled); manifest dimension_associations.

reconstruction_roadmap.title: Raster acquisition and preprocess
reconstruction_roadmap.implementation: preprocess.preprocess: denoise, deskew, scale; grayscale for ink mask + skeleton.

reconstruction_roadmap.title: Ink / geometry vs text separation
reconstruction_roadmap.implementation: OCR masks + annotation_clean text interior inpainting; dimension text not structured as DIM entities.

reconstruction_roadmap.title: Primitive extraction (lines, arcs, circles)
reconstruction_roadmap.implementation: skeleton_vectorize + vectorize; optional Hough circles (--skeleton-circles); vector_fit arcs; fragments remain without strong reconstruction.

reconstruction_roadmap.title: Topology repair and graph connectivity
reconstruction_roadmap.implementation: topology_repair.repair_exploded_segments; topology_clean.refine_vector_drawing; engineering_intel axis/cluster snaps when enabled (--python-* or --reconstruction shop).

reconstruction_roadmap.title: Constraint and orthogonal regularization
reconstruction_roadmap.implementation: constraint_heal orthogonal quads; residual snaps in engineering_intel_passes; full constraint solver not implemented.

reconstruction_roadmap.title: Dimension system reconstruction
reconstruction_roadmap.implementation: annotations_export.dimension_association_bundle + DIMENSION_HINT layer; no full extension-line / arrow DIM block model.

reconstruction_roadmap.title: Semantic entity classification
reconstruction_roadmap.implementation: segment_semantics + raster_semantics / ONNX; engineering_intel_extended.symbol_candidates; engineering_reconstruction_suite multilayer bucket expansion.

reconstruction_roadmap.title: Structured DXF / layer model
reconstruction_roadmap.implementation: export_dxf: LWPOLYLINE, LINE, ARC, CIRCLE, TEXT, layers per part/panel.

reconstruction_roadmap.title: Native CAD polish (MCP / interactive)
reconstruction_roadmap.implementation: cad_mcp_recipe: JOIN, OVERKILL, PEDIT, layers—assumes reasonable upstream geometry.
